path.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 12; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1;
fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1;
fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke-width: 6; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-linecap: round;

text.style: text-transform: uppercase; font-family: Roboto; letter-spacing: 2px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; white-space: pre; font-size: 90px; text-decoration: none; direction: ltr; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 1;

text-transform: uppercase; font-family: Roboto; letter-spacing: 2px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; white-space: pre; font-size: 90px; text-decoration: none; direction: ltr; fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1;

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1;
